fields.name: EN_OFLOW_RST_FS
fields.description: When enabled, memory overflow resets frame sync generation

enum_values.0b0: Do not reset frame sync generation when memory overflow occurs
enum_values.0b1: Reset frame sync generation when memory overflow occurs

fields.name: FSYNC_OUT_PIN
fields.description: Select pin to output frame sync signal (effective only when FSYNC_METH = 01)

fields.name: EN_VS_GEN
fields.description: When enabled, VS is generated internally by the frame sync generator (not effective when FSYNC_MODE = 11)

enum_values.0x0: Internal frame sync does not generate VS

enum_values.0b00: Frame sync generation is on. FSYNC_OUT pin is not used as FSYNC output, but a GPIO on the remote side can be used
enum_values.0b01: Frame sync generation is on. FSYNC_OUT pin is used as FSYNC output and drives subordinate device, and a GPIO on the remote side can be used
enum_values.0b10: Frame sync generation is off. FSYNC_OUT pin is not used as FSYNC output.
enum_values.0b11: Frame sync generation is off. FSYNC_OUT pin is not used as FSYNC output

fields.name: FSYNC_PER_DIV
fields.description: Frame sync transmission period in terms of V SYNC periods

fields.name: MST_LINK_SEL
fields.description: Main link select for frame sync generation

fields.name: K_VAL
fields.description: Desired frame sync margin (microseconds, typical) with respect to the V SYNC of the slowest link in auto mode or with respect to the V SYNC of the main link in semi-auto mode.

FSYNC.name: FSYNC_3
FSYNC.description: Low byte of desired frame sync margin

fields.name: P_VAL_L
fields.description: Low byte of desired frame sync margin in terms of PCLK cycles

FSYNC.name: FSYNC_4
FSYNC.description: Sign bit and high bits of frame sync margin

fields.name: P_VAL_H
fields.description: High bits of desired frame sync margin in terms of PCLK cycles

FSYNC.name: FSYNC_5
FSYNC.description: Low byte of frame sync period

fields.name: FSYNC_PERIOD_L
fields.description: Low byte of frame sync period in terms of pixel clock

UART.name: UART_1
UART.description: UART detected bit length low 8 bits register

fields.name: BITLEN_LSB
fields.description: UART detected bit length, low 8 bits. Detected UART pin BAUD rate in terms of 150MHz clock cycles.

UART.name: UART_2
UART.description: UART detected bit length MSB and output delay register

fields.name: OUT_DELAY
fields.description: UART initial output delay. In Base mode, first received UART byte of a packet is delayed by the configured number of bit times.

fields.name: BITLEN_MSB
fields.description: UART detected bit length, high 6 bits. Detected UART pin BAUD rate in terms of 150MHz clock cycles.

fields.name: REM_MS_EN_1
fields.description: Enable UART Bypass mode control by remote GPIO pin. When set, remote chip's GPIO is used as MS pin (UART mode select). When MS is high, chip is in Bypass mode; otherwise, chip is in Base mode.

fields.name: LOC_MS_EN_1
fields.description: Enable UART Bypass mode control by local GPIO pin. Set to use GPIO2 pin as MS pin (UART mode select). When MS is high, chip is in Bypass mode; otherwise, chip is in Base mode.

fields.name: BYPASS_TO_1
fields.description: UART soft-bypass timeout duration. When set to 11, BYPASS_EN is never cleared, so the device stays in Bypass mode until next power down.

fields.name: BYPASS_EN_1
fields.description: Enable UART soft-bypass mode. Bypass mode remains active as long as there is UART activity. When there is no UART activity for selected duration (configured by BYPASS_TO bitfield), device exits Bypass mode, and the bit is automatically cleared.

fields.name: MSGCNTR_PORT_SEL

fields.description: Enable I^2 C/UART Message Counter override when set to 1 Only active when CC_CRC_MSGCNTR_OVR = 1.

fields.name: CC_CRC_EN
fields.description: Enable I^2 C/UART CRC override when set to 1 Only active when CC_CRC_MSGCNTR_OVR = 1.

fields.name: CC_CRC_MSGCNTR_OVR
fields.description: Enable I^2 C/UART CRC or Message Counter override when set to 1 When 0, eFuse controls CRC and Message Counter options.

fields.name: I2C_UART_MSG_CNTR_ERR_OEN

fields.name: I2C_UART_CRC_ERR_OEN

fields.name: MEM_ECC_ERR2_OEN

fields.name: MEM_ECC_ERR1_OEN
fields.description: Enable reporting of memory ECC 1-bit correctable errors at ERRB pin

fields.name: EFUSE_CRC_ERR_OEN
fields.description: Enable reporting eFuse CRC at ERRB pin

fields.name: REG_CRC_ERR_OEN
fields.description: Enable reporting register CRC at ERRB pin

fields.description: GMSL link locked (bidirectional). For Link B only.

fields.name: FEC_RX_ERR_OEN_B
fields.description: FEC RX error output enable B

fields.name: FEC_B_INACTIVE_OEN
fields.description: Enable reporting of link B FEC handshake error (FEC_B_INACTIVE) at the ERRB pin.

fields.name: FEC_A_INACTIVE_OEN
fields.description: Enable reporting of link A FEC handshake error (FEC_A_INACTIVE) at the ERRB pin.

fields.name: video_mem_overflow_oen
fields.description: Enable reporting of BACKTOP video memory overflow error (video_mem_overflow) at the ERRB pin.

fields.name: LOSS_OF_LOCK_OEN
fields.description: Enable reporting loss-of-lock detection (LOSS_OF_LOCK_FLAG) at the ERRB pin.

fields.name: FEC_B_INACTIVE
fields.description: Error flag indicating that when the FEC decoder on Link B is enabled through the config pin, the expected FEC encoder handshake InfoFrame from the serializer is not received 1ms past Link B lock. The handshake is required before the FEC decoder is officially turned ON. This is a clear-on-read sticky error flag.

fields.name: FEC_A_INACTIVE
fields.description: Error flag indicating that when the FEC decoder on Link A is enabled through the config pin, the expected FEC encoder handshake InfoFrame from the serializer is not received 1ms past Link A lock. fields.name: REM_MS_EN_2

fields.name: BYPASS_TO_2

fields.name: BYPASS_EN_2
